div.p: Broker.Start → RecoveryManager.Recover → filter by committed offset → TopicManager.RequeueFromRecovery → Start accepting connections

ol.li: Load committed consumer offsets from consumer_offsets.json
Discover all topic log files via *.log glob
Read all entries with CRC32 verification (skip corrupted)
Re-queue filtered messages to pending queues
Update nextOffset counter to resume sequence
Begin accepting new TCP connections Invariant: Messages at or before committed offset are NOT re-queued (already processed)

ul.li: CRC32 mismatch → skip entry with warning, continue recovery
